title: Dragon Survival: 16x Dragon Textures
description: Changes 32x Dragon Textures In Dragon Survival Mod To Be 16x.
body:
Dragon Survival: 16x Textures Is A Texture Pack I Made That Makes Dragon/Armor Textures In Dragon Survival Mod 16x Instead Of 32x To Provide Consistency With Both Vanilla And Other Mods.


I Made This Pack For Personal Use. But I Spent Way Too Much Time On This To Not Post. Plus I'm Sure Others Would Like This Pack Aswell, And I Pick Kindness 70% Of The Time.

I Don't Plan To Make A Ton More Updates Unless There's Something Gamebreaking Somehow.
